senses.definition_dg: Kuchora vibaya-vibaya, kupiga alama zisizo na mpango.

examples.en: Children have scribbled on the wall
examples.sw: Watoto walichora vibaya ukutani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuoneshwa mambo ni Mulungu au pepo, maono.

examples.dg: Nabii waona njozi kula kpwa Mulungu.
examples.en: The prophet saw a vision from God.
examples.sw: Nabii aliona njozi kutoka kwa Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra kuphanda risagwikaro kuhumirwa kpwa kurya au kuphika.

examples.dg: Njugu za kukalanga ni tsemu sana.
examples.en: Roasted peanuts are very tasty.
examples.sw: Njugu za kukaanga ni tamu sana.

senses.definition_en: drip by drip, slowly (of water that is overflowing)
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya madzi kutona chiasi-chiasi, pole-pole.

examples.en: Water is overflowing drip by drip/slowly
examples.sw: Maji yanatona polepole kutoka bomba lililovunjika.

senses.definition_en: dza vivyo kabla ya viunganisho (phamwenga, jizani n.k.) na kabla ya
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kielezi rinaonyesha jinsi ya kuandika maneno ga Chidigo.

examples.dg: Maneno ga Chidigo gana njira maalumu ya nkuandikpwa.
examples.en: Digo words have a specific way of being written.
examples.sw: Maneno ya Kidigo yana njia maalumu ya kuandikwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa kawaida, mambo ganagoenderera kuhendeka.

examples.en: He goes to school regularly
examples.sw: Huwa anakwenda shule kila siku.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyoka yenye sumu anayeishi dzulu ya mihi.

examples.dg: Nkundangandzi ni nyoka wa hatari sana.
examples.en: The bark snake is a very dangerous snake.
examples.sw: Nkundangandzi ni nyoka hatari sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chiasi cha inne, bada ya tahu na kabla ya tsano.

examples.dg: Ise kala akazikpwa siku nne zotsupa
examples.en: His father had been buried four days previously
examples.sw: Alikuwa amezikwa siku nne zilizopita.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chisu au chombo chiwe na ukali, kunoa.

examples.dg: Nola panga iyo kabla ya kuphiya mundani.
examples.en: Sharpen that machete before going to the farm.
examples.sw: Noa panga hiyo kabla ya kwenda shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na nyama nyinji mwirini, kuwa mnono.

examples.en: That cow has become nicely fat.
examples.sw: Ng'ombe huyo amenona vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba pole-pole kpwa sauti ndide ili atu anjine asisikie.

examples.en: Don't whisper in class, speak out loud.
examples.sw: Usinong'oneze darasani, sema kwa sauti.

senses.definition_en: dirt, dead skin which comes off when you wash
senses.definition_dg: Uchafu wa ngozi unaouka mutu anagoga.

examples.dg: Goga vinono ili usule nongo zosi.
examples.en: Wash well to remove all the dead skin.
examples.sw: Oga vizuri ili uondoe uchafu wote wa ngozi.

senses.definition_dg: Chenye kupendeza, kisicho na makosa; kizuri.

examples.en: That child has good manners.
examples.sw: Mtoto huyo ana tabia nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Tsi yenye atu, yenye utawala; nchi.

examples.en: Our country is very beautiful.
examples.sw: Nchi yetu ni nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa harufu mbaya.

examples.dg: Samaki andafwa na higo madzi gandanuka sana
examples.en: The fish will die and that water will stink terribly
examples.sw: Samaki alikufa na maji yale yakanuka sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kidide chenye maphaphe chiururukayo usiku.

examples.dg: Nundu araruka usiku tu, mchana analala.
examples.en: Bats only fly at night, during the day they sleep.
examples.sw: Popo wanaruka usiku tu, mchana wanalala.

senses.definition_en: hump on back, esp. of native cattle
senses.definition_dg: Chirundu kpwenye mgongo wa ng'ombe, hasa wa chienyeji.

examples.dg: Ng'ombe wa hipha ana nundu kubwa mgongoni.
examples.en: The local cattle have a big hump on their backs.
examples.sw: Ng'ombe wa hapa wana nundu kubwa mgongoni.

sub_entries.definition_sw: has a high-pitched call similar to an
aina ya popo mwenye mabawa ya mandano na huwa na mlio sawa na chuma kinapogongwa

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kidide chenye maphaphe chiururukayo usiku.

examples.dg: Nundu araruka usiku tu, mchana analala.
examples.en: Bats only fly at night, during the day they sleep.
examples.sw: Popo wanaruka usiku tu, mchana wanalala.

senses.definition_dg: Kulalamika, kugomba kpwa kutoridhika.

examples.en: Do not grumble against one another lest you be judged
examples.sw: Msinung'unikirane msije mkahukumiwa.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chenye miba minji ya kure mwirini.

examples.en: The porcupine protects itself with its quills.
examples.sw: Nungunungu anajilinda kwa miba yake.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kidide chenye miba fupi mwirini, anayedzikunya achiogopha.

examples.en: The hedgehog curled up like a ball when scared.
examples.sw: Kinungumaria alijikusanya kama mpira alipoogopa.

senses.definition_en: to smell something, to sniff something
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda upuhiro wa pula ili usikire harufu ya chitu.

examples.en: Smell this flower, it smells nice.
examples.sw: Nusa ua hili, linanukia vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kumiza chitu cha madzi kpwa kanwa.

examples.dg: Nwa madzi manji wakati wa dzuwa kali.
examples.en: Drink plenty of water when the sun is hot.
examples.sw: Kunywa maji mengi wakati wa jua kali.

sub_entries.definition_en: have been drunk (e.g. a cup of water)
sub_entries.definition_sw: kunwewa
kunyweka

examples.dg: Atu atsimba kanda-kanda ya muho ili aphahe madzi ga kunwa, mana madzi ga muho ka taganweka
examples.en: People dug beside the river in order to get drinking water, because the water from the river was not drinkable

examples.dg: Asichana akpwedzaheka madzi ili kunwesa mang'ondzi na mbuzi za ise yao
examples.en: Some girls came and drew water in order to water the sheep and goats of their father

senses.definition_dg: Mvula kutuluka kula dzuluni; kunyesha.

examples.en: It rained and it stopped
examples.sw: Mvua ilinyesha na ikaacha.

senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa uchafu wa mwiri.

examples.en: The child wants to excrete.
examples.sw: Mtoto anataka kunya.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kunyeshera

senses.definition_dg: Hatua mwenga ya kunyendeka, kupiga gulu limwenga.

examples.en: Two strides and you will be there.
examples.sw: Hatua mbili na utakuwa pale.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo muovu.

examples.en: The nyagu is an evil spirit that frightens people.
examples.sw: Nyagu ni pepo anayeogofya watu.

sub_entries.definition_sw: angalia nyuni

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya nyerera.

examples.en: The nyaha is a traditional animal.
examples.sw: Nyaha ni mnyama wa kienyeji.

senses.definition_en: to scoop up something dry (e.g. sand, beans) with one's hand
senses.definition_dg: Kuchota vitu vikavu dza mtsanga au maharagwe kpwa mkpwono.

examples.dg: Nyaha unga kula ndani ya gunia.
examples.en: Scoop up some flour from inside the sack.
examples.sw: Chota unga kutoka ndani ya gunia.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kikulu cha tsakani chenye nguvu nyinji na pembe.

examples.dg: Nyahi ni chinyama cha hatari sana tsakani.
examples.en: The buffalo is a very dangerous animal in the wild.
examples.sw: Nyati ni mnyama hatari sana porini.

senses.definition_dg: Seemu ya chifuwa cha mchetu inayotsutsa mwana.

examples.en: The baby is suckling the mother's breast.
examples.sw: Mtoto ananyonya ziwa la mama.

senses.definition_en: to catch something that is falling
senses.definition_dg: Kushika chitu chinaanguka kabla ya kuguta photsi.

examples.en: He caught the ball
examples.sw: Alidaka mpira vizuri.

senses.definition_en: to wither, to shrivel (e.g. trees, fruit, leaves)
senses.definition_dg: Kunyauka, kusinyaa kpwa mihi, matunda au majani.

examples.en: The plants withered from lack of water.
examples.sw: Mimea ilinyauka kwa kukosa maji.

senses.definition_dg: Chiumbe chenye uhai chinaishicho tsakani au nyumbani.

examples.en: In the wild there are all kinds of animals.
examples.sw: Porini kuna wanyama wa aina mbalimbali.

sub_entries.definition_sw: sehemu ya mguu yenye nyama nyingi

senses.definition_en: to keep quiet, especially to stop crying
senses.definition_dg: Kunyamala, kuricha kugomba au kurira.

examples.dg: Mwanache akanyamala bada ya kuphaha chakurya.
examples.en: The child became quiet after getting food.
examples.sw: Mtoto alinyamaza baada ya kupata chakula.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa unyamavu, bila sauti.

examples.en: He sat there quietly.
examples.sw: Alikaa pale kimya.

senses.definition_en: to be glutinous, to be elastic
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hali ya kunata-nata au kuvutika dza mpira.

examples.dg: Unga wa muhogo uchiikpwa madzi unanyamburika.
examples.en: Cassava flour becomes sticky when mixed with water.
examples.sw: Unga wa muhogo unakuwa mnato ukichanganywa na maji.

equivalents_sw: kipande kidogo sana hasa cha nyama

senses.definition_sw: kipande kidogo sana hasa cha nyama
senses.definition_dg: Chipande kidide sana cha nyama.

examples.en: Only a tiny scrap of meat is left.
examples.sw: Kipande kidogo sana cha nyama ndicho kilichobaki.

senses.definition_en: to grab, to snatch, e.g. when a number of children grab sweets
senses.definition_dg: Kushika chitu kpwa nguvu kula kpwa mutu mwanjine.

examples.en: The children are grabbing sweets from each other.
examples.sw: Watoto wananyang'anyana peremende.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kunyang'anyia

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chinaofanana na mutu; nyani.

examples.dg: Nyani anaharibu mimea ya atu mundani.
examples.en: Baboons destroy people's crops in the garden.
examples.sw: Nyani wanaharibu mimea ya watu shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra kundu rinahumirwa kpwa kuphikira mchuzi.

examples.en: Add tomatoes to the sauce.
examples.sw: Weka nyanya kwenye mchuzi.

senses.definition_en: to stalk, to creep, to walk stealthily
senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka pole-pole na kpwa siri ili mutu asionekane.

examples.dg: Paka ananyapa kpwa siri kumgbwira nyuni.
examples.en: The cat creeps stealthily to catch a bird.
examples.sw: Paka ananyemelea kwa siri kumkamata ndege.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa kibara anayeingira mutu.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anapigwa ni pepo wa Nyare.
examples.en: That person is possessed by an upcountry spirit called Nyare.
examples.sw: Mtu huyo anapigwa na pepo wa kibara uitwao Nyare.

senses.definition_dg: Kumgombeza mutu kpwa makosa gake, kukaripia.

examples.dg: Baba wamnyasa mwanawe kpwa kutokuphiya skuli.
examples.en: The father rebuked his child for not going to school.
examples.sw: Baba alimkaripia mwanawe kwa kutokwenda shule.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hali ya kunata, kushikamana na chitu.

examples.en: Honey is very sticky on the hands.
examples.sw: Asali inanata sana mikononi.

senses.definition_dg: Maingu ga mvula, galala ga kuonyesha mvula ikakaribia.

examples.en: Rain clouds are appearing, rain is near.
examples.sw: Mawingu ya mvua yanaonekana, mvua inakaribia.

senses.definition_dg: Alama ya gulu photsi, hatua.

examples.dg: Nyayo za mutu zinaonekana kpwenye mtsanga.
examples.en: A person's footsteps are visible in the sand.
examples.sw: Nyayo za mtu zinaonekana kwenye mchanga.

senses.definition_dg: Kusikira hali ya kutaka kukuna ngozi.

examples.dg: Ngozi yangu inanyejera kpwa sababu ya uduvi.
examples.en: My skin is itchy because of mosquito bites.
examples.sw: Ngozi yangu inawasha kwa sababu ya mbu.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chenye rangi nyerupe na nyiru, anayerya nyuchi.

examples.dg: Nyejere anavundza mizinga ya nyuchi kpwa makucha gake.
examples.en: The honey badger breaks beehives with its claws.
examples.sw: Nyegere anavunja mizinga ya nyuki kwa makucha yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uwezo wa kupindika bila kuvundzika.

examples.dg: Muhi wuno unanyembweka, kauvundziki kpwa urahisi.
examples.en: This tree is flexible, it doesn't break easily.
examples.sw: Mti huu unanyumbuka, hauvunjiki kwa urahisi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya kpwa magulu, kutembea.

examples.dg: Hwanyendeka kpwa magulu kula mudzini hadi mudzi wa phiri.
examples.en: We walked on foot from town to the next village.
examples.sw: Tulitembea kwa miguu kutoka mjini hadi kijiji kingine.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya kumtembelea mutu phakpwe, kutembelea.

examples.en: We went to visit grandmother today.
examples.sw: Tulikwenda kumtembelea bibi leo.

sub_entries.definition_sw: bakora, fimbo

senses.definition_dg: Kidudu kidide cha tsakani chinaimba usiku.

examples.en: Crickets sing on rainy nights.
examples.sw: Nyenje wanaimba usiku wa mvua.

sub_entries.definition_en: to hear a ringing or buzzing sound in one's ears
sub_entries.definition_sw: to have tinnitus; kusikia sauti kama ya mdudu sikioni

senses.definition_dg: Kudzishusha, kukala na unyenyekevu.

examples.en: Humble yourself before God.
examples.sw: Nyenyekea mbele za Mungu.

senses.definition_en: to touch someone lightly, to brush against someone
senses.definition_dg: Kugusa mutu pole-pole na kpwa upesi.

examples.en: The cat brushed lightly against its owner with its tail.
examples.sw: Paka alimpapasa mwenyewe kwa mkia.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya nyongoo.

examples.dg: Nyerereka ni aina ya ukongo wa achetu a mimba.
examples.en: Nyerereka is a type of illness affecting pregnant women.
examples.sw: Nyerereka ni aina ya ugonjwa wa wanawake wenye mimba.

senses.definition_en: to walk unsteadily or with difficulty
senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa shida, bila nguvu.

examples.en: The sick person walks unsteadily, with no energy.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa anatembea bila nguvu, hana uwezo.

senses.definition_dg: Kusumbua mutu kpwa kumtania au kumkasirisha.

examples.en: Don't tease your sibling, they will cry.
examples.sw: Usimnyete ndugu yako, atalia.

equivalents_en: prefix used before monosyllabic adjectives which modify nouns of class 9/10 (nyumba

senses.definition_en: prefix used before monosyllabic adjectives which modify nouns of class 9/10 (nyumba, meza, etc. whose plural form is the same as their
senses.definition_dg: Kiambishi cha mbere chinahumirwa na vivumishi vya silabi mwenga na nomino za darasa ra 9/10.

examples.en: A dirty house is a filthy house.
examples.sw: Nyumba chafu ni nyumba isiyopendeza.

sub_entries.definition_sw: n-/m- (kiambishiawali, yaani nafsi, chinachotumiwa kabla ya vivumishi, ama sifa, vya silabi moja vya ngeli nomino 9/10)

examples.en: A new house

examples.dg: Proverb: Kuangamika nyika ndiko kumanya nyika
examples.en: To get lost in the wilderness is to know the wilderness
examples.sw: Kupotea nyikani ndiko kuijua nyika.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kielezi rinaonyesha hali ya kuandikwa kpwa Chidigo.

examples.dg: Maneno ga Chidigo ni nyinji na gana mana tofauti.
examples.en: Digo words are many and have different meanings.
examples.sw: Maneno ya Kidigo ni mengi na yana maana tofauti.

senses.definition_en: to look healthy (plants, animals and people)
senses.definition_dg: Kuonekana na afya nono, kunawiri kpwa mimea, nyama au atu.

examples.dg: Mimea iyo inanyinyiha kpwa sababu ya mvula nono.
examples.en: Those plants look healthy because of good rain.
examples.sw: Mimea hiyo inanawiri kwa sababu ya mvua nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kung'aa na kupendeza, kumetameta.

examples.en: Stars glisten in the dark night.
examples.sw: Nyota zinametameta usiku wa giza.

equivalents_en: kind of green grasshopper common in maize (order Orthoptera)

senses.definition_en: kind of green grasshopper common in maize (order Orthoptera)
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya panzi wa rangi ya kijani anayeishi kpwenye mahindi.

examples.dg: Nyoe zinaisha kurya majani ga mahindi.
examples.en: The green grasshoppers are eating the maize leaves.
examples.sw: Nyoe wanakula majani ya mahindi.

senses.definition_en: type of locust often found in maize plants when just about to
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya ndzije anayepatikana kpwenye mimea ya mahindi inayokaribia kukomaa.

examples.dg: Nyohe anapatikana wakati mahindi gakakaribia kukomaa.
examples.en: The nyohe locust is found when maize is about to ripen.
examples.sw: Nyohe anapatikana wakati mahindi yanakaribia kuiva.

aina ya nyoka

senses.definition_en: general rebuke, equivalent to swearing at someone (old usage)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra zamani ra kutukana.

examples.dg: Nyoko ni neno ra kare ra kukasirisha.
examples.en: Nyoko is an old word of rebuke.
examples.sw: Nyoko ni neno la zamani la kutukana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukata nyere kpwa wembe au chisu; kunyoa.

examples.en: Go and get a haircut.
examples.sw: Nenda ukanyolewe nywele.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kunyowa kabisa

equivalents_en: kusikira to feel weak and feeble

senses.definition_en: , kusikira to feel weak and feeble
senses.definition_dg: Kusikira unyonge na kukosa nguvu mwirini.

examples.en: The sick person feels weak all over the body.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa anajisikia mnyonge mwili wote.

senses.definition_dg: Seemu ya mwiri kahi ya chiuno na gulu, paja.

examples.en: His hip hurts from walking a lot.
examples.sw: Paja linamuuma kwa kutembea sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukaba sindano ya mutu ili afe.

examples.en: The thief strangled the homeowner.
examples.sw: Mwizi alimnyonga mwenye nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinaongezwa dzulu ya kiricho, ziada.

examples.dg: Waphaha nyongeza ya mishahara mwezi huno.
examples.en: He got a salary increase this month.
examples.sw: Alipata nyongeza ya mshahara mwezi huu.

equivalents_sw: at least fifty types of nyongoo are recognised

senses.definition_en: complications and illnesses associated with childbirth
senses.definition_sw: at least fifty types of nyongoo are recognised, which are classified according to description of symptoms, treatment or ascribed causes, such as transgression of sexual taboos or disturbed relationships with ancestral spirits; Aina ya ugonjwa unaowapata wanawake wenye mimba
senses.definition_dg: Makongo na shida zinazoambatana na mimba au kuzala, zenye aina nyinji.

examples.dg: Mkpwazangu ana mimba, kpwa hivyo ni lazima akatsodzwe nyongoo
examples.en: My wife is pregnant, so she must go and be treated for 'nyongoo'
examples.sw: Mke wangu ana mimba, kwa hivyo ni lazima atibiwe nyongoo.

sub_entries.definition_en: child to be born with blisters, often stillborn
sub_entries.definition_sw: dalili zake ni
husababisha kuzaliwa kwa mtoto akiwa na malengelenge, na mara nyingi huzaliwa akiwa amekufa

senses.definition_dg: Kukala hali ya kunyooka, siyo kupinda.

examples.dg: Njira hino inanyooka hadi mudzi wa mbere.
examples.en: This road is straight all the way to the next village.
examples.sw: Njia hii inanyooka hadi kijiji cha mbele.

senses.definition_en: to stretch something, to straighten something
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chiwe chimenyooka, kuvuta chitu chiwe golofu.

examples.en: Straighten that rope well.
examples.sw: Nyoosha kamba hiyo vizuri.

senses.definition_en: to pluck (fruit and leaves), to pick (fruit)
senses.definition_dg: Kutunda matunda au majani kula muhini.

examples.en: The children plucked mangoes from the tree.
examples.sw: Watoto walichuma maembe kutoka mtini.

sub_entries.definition_en: have fallen (used of ripe fruit and fallen leaves)
sub_entries.definition_sw: kutundika

senses.definition_dg: Chinachofunika mwiri wa nyuni; maphaphe.

examples.dg: Nyoya za nyuni hino zina rangi nono.
examples.en: This bird's feathers have beautiful colours.
examples.sw: Manyoya ya ndege huyu yana rangi nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kidudu chenye kubwa kidide kinahenda asali.

examples.dg: Nyuchi zinaisha kuhenda asali kpwenye mzinga.
examples.en: Bees are making honey in the hive.
examples.sw: Nyuki wanatengeneza asali kwenye mzinga.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chinaofanana na nyejere.

examples.en: The nyuchira is an animal that lives in the wild.
examples.sw: Nyuchira ni mnyama anayeishi porini.

senses.definition_en: to suck (using a straw), also used for insects sucking nectar
senses.definition_dg: Kufyondza kpwa kuhumira mirija, pia vidudu vinavyofyondza utomvu.

examples.en: The child is sucking juice with a straw.
examples.sw: Mtoto anafyonza juisi kwa mirija.

senses.definition_en: to be in pieces, to be shredded
senses.definition_dg: Kukala vipande-vipande, kuchanika.

examples.en: His cloth came apart in pieces from dryness.
examples.sw: Nguo yake ilipasuka vipande kwa ukavu.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyonya maziwa kula kpwa mayo, kpwa mwanache au mwana wa nyama.

examples.en: The calf is suckling milk from its mother.
examples.sw: Ndama ananyonya maziwa kutoka kwa mama yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvuta chitu chiwe chire, kutanua.

examples.en: Stretch that rope with force.
examples.sw: Vuta kamba hiyo kwa nguvu.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kunyumbuka

senses.definition_dg: Seemu ya uphande wa kure na mbere ya chitu, nyuma.

examples.en: The back of this house is good
examples.sw: Nyumba hii, nyuma yake ni nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati uriopita, siku za kare.

examples.en: He went many days ago
examples.sw: Aliondoka siku nyingi zilizopita.

sub_entries.definition_sw: nyuma

examples.dg: Nyuma ya nyumba yangu phana msufi; nyumaye phana msufi
examples.en: Behind my house is a kapok tree; behind it is a kapok tree

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hali ya kunata, kushikamana na chitu.

examples.en: Clay becomes sticky when mixed with water.
examples.sw: Udongo unakuwa mnato ukichanganywa na maji.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha chuma cha kupigira misumari.

examples.en: Bring the hammer so I can hit the nails.
examples.sw: Lete nyundo nipige misumari.

senses.definition_en: rejected, ignored, disowned, ostracised, sent to coventry
senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariyetengwa na uma, asiyekubarika ni atu.

examples.dg: Mutu wa nyunga kaenderwa ni mutu.
examples.en: An ostracised person is not visited by anyone.
examples.sw: Mtu aliyetengwa haendewi na mtu yeyote.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kuphikira au kushikira madzi, chirichohendwa kpwa udongo.

examples.en: The water pot is full.
examples.sw: Chungu cha maji kimejaa.

equivalents_en: a 'Digo' spirit which possesses children at home
equivalents_sw: pepo wa kidigo apagawaye watoto nyumbani

senses.definition_en: a 'Digo' spirit which possesses children at home
senses.definition_sw: pepo wa kidigo apagawaye watoto nyumbani
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa Chidigo anayepagaza anache nyumbani.

examples.dg: Nyuni anapagaza anache adide kpwenye nyumba.
examples.en: The Nyuni spirit possesses small children at home.
examples.sw: Pepo wa Nyuni huwapagaza watoto wadogo nyumbani.

equivalents_sw: the appearance of any of these birds is believed to cause the illness

senses.definition_en: class of birds including eagle, chicken, owl, woodpecker and black kite
senses.definition_sw: the appearance of any of these birds is believed to cause the illness
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni ambazo kuonekana kwao kunaaminika kunareha ukongo; tai, kuku, bundi na anjine.

examples.dg: Nyuni anayeonekana nyumbani anamreha mwanache ukongo.
examples.en: A bird seen at home brings illness to a child.
examples.sw: Ndege anayeonekana nyumbani humleta mtoto ugonjwa.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kundi la ndege linalohusisha mwewe, kuku, bundi
kuonekana kwa ndege yeyote kati ya hawa kunaaminika kuwa husababisha ugonjwa unaoitwa nyuni

equivalents_en: convulsion affecting young children: the child suddenly collapses

senses.definition_en: convulsion affecting young children: the child suddenly collapses
senses.definition_dg: Ukongo wa kuanguka gafula unaotswa anache adide.

examples.dg: Mwanache achianguka gafula, atu akaamba ni nyuni.
examples.en: When a child suddenly collapses, people say it is nyuni.
examples.sw: Mtoto anapokuanguka ghafula, watu husema ni nyuni.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa Chidigo anayepagaza anache nyumbani.

examples.dg: Nyuni anapagaza anache adide kpwenye nyumba.
examples.en: The Nyuni spirit possesses small children at home.
examples.sw: Pepo wa Nyuni huwapagaza watoto wadogo nyumbani.

sub_entries.definition_en: rolling and contractions of legs and arms occur
sub_entries.definition_sw: this illness is traditionally associated with the appearance of birds of the nyuni class (see above); ugonjwa ambao hufanya watoto wadogo kutetemeka: mtoto huanguka kwa ghafula, macho huanza kuzunguka na hujivuta
ugonjwa huo unaaminika kuletwa na kuonekana kwa ndege wa jamii ya nyuni (angalia juu)
dalili zake ni kuharisha na kutapika
dalili zake ni homa na kulia
dalili zake ni kupumua haraka, kukohoa, homa, kutetemeka na mdomo mkavu
dalili zake ni mchafuko wa tumbo, kukosa maji mwilini na utosi uliozama
dalili zake ni kuzungusha macho, tumbo inayotoa sauti, na kukosa hamu ya chakula
dalili zake ni mchafuko wa tumbo, kukosa maji mwilini, utosi uliozama, na mdomo mkavu
dalili zake ni kuzungusha macho
dalili zake ni homa na kutetemeka sana kwa miguu na mikono
aina mbaya ya nyuni inayoleta kuharisha na kutapika, kulia, kokohoa na kutetemeka
possibly a term for tetanus (pepo punda); aina ya nyuni ambayo hutokea mara tu baada ya kuzaliwa
pengine jina lingine kwa

equivalents_en: odzala pepo punda. nyuni nyagu chidivo kind of nyuni involving first swollen abdomen
equivalents_sw: aina ya nyuni inayoleta kufura kwa tumbo

senses.definition_en: odzala pepo punda. nyuni nyagu chidivo kind of nyuni involving first swollen abdomen, then diarrhoea
senses.definition_sw: aina ya nyuni inayoleta kufura kwa tumbo, na kisha kuharisha
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya ukongo wa nyuni unaohenda tumbo rivimbe na kuharisha.

examples.dg: Nyunyiriza inaanza na kuvimba kpwa tumbo.
examples.en: This type of nyuni illness starts with a swollen abdomen.
examples.sw: Nyunyiriza inaanza na kuvimba kwa tumbo.

sub_entries.definition_sw: dalili zake ni mchafulo wa tumbo, kukosa maji mwilini, mdomo na ulimi mkavu, na mwili ulioparara
dalili zake ni kuzungusha macho, mikono iloyokazana na kifo cha ghafula

senses.definition_dg: Kumwagira madzi chiasi-chiasi, kunyunyizia.

examples.en: Sprinkle water on the plants.
examples.sw: Nyunyizia maji kwenye mimea.

senses.definition_dg: Kumwagira madzi au chitu cha madzi chiasi-chiasi.

examples.dg: Nyunyiza madzi kpwenye nguwo kabla ya kupiga pasi.
examples.en: Sprinkle water on the clothes before ironing.
examples.sw: Nyunyiza maji kwenye nguo kabla ya kupiga pasi.

senses.definition_dg: Wingi wa luswi; ngozi ya dzulu ya dzitso, kope.

examples.dg: Nyuswi zake ni ndefu na nono.
examples.en: Her eyelashes are long and beautiful.
examples.sw: Kope zake ni ndefu na nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kupepesa dzitso limwenga kpwa ishara; kukonyeza.

examples.en: She winked at him secretly.
examples.sw: Alimkonyeza jicho kwa siri.

equivalents_sw: aina ya ndege wadogo wanaoruka kwa makundi

senses.definition_sw: aina ya ndege wadogo wanaoruka kwa makundi
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni adide a rangi ya kahawia arururukao kpwa makundi makulu.

examples.dg: Nyuvi anaharibu mimea ya muhama kpwa unji wao.
examples.en: Quelea birds destroy grain crops with their numbers.
examples.sw: Nyuvi wanaharibu mimea ya nafaka kwa wingi wao.

senses.definition_en: to return to normal after swelling, to dry up (e.g. lake)
senses.definition_dg: Kuuya kpwa hali ya kawaida bada ya kuvimba; kunywa au kupwaya.

examples.en: The leg swelling went down after the medicine.
examples.sw: Mguu ulipwaya baada ya dawa.
